violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (juice) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of at time of inspection. Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
